title: Press Release 19.09.2024 [Malay – English] – Corporate Income Tax Socialisation Session
text:
SIARAN AKHBAR
KEMENTERIAN KEWANGAN DAN EKONOMI
SESI PEMBERIGAAN CUKAI PENDAPATAN KORPORAT
1. Kementerian Kewangan dan Ekonomi (MOFE) melalui Bahagian Hasil telah mengadakan Sesi
Pemberigaan Cukai Pendapatan Korporat pada hari Sabtu, 14hb. September 2024 yang
berlangsung di Bilik Serbaguna 2, Tingkat 3, Island Block, Kementerian Kewangan dan
Ekonomi.
2. Sesi ini bertujuan bagi meningkatkan kefahaman kepada syarikat mengenai pentadbiran cukai
di Negara ini serta membantu syarikat untuk meningkatkan kesedaran terhadap pematuhan
Cukai Pendapatan Korporat.
3. Sesi telah disampaikan oleh YM Nurul Fadilah binti Hj Osman, Pegawai Kewangan dari
Bahagian Hasil, MOFE yang antaranya telah menjelaskan secara menyeluruh tentang Cukai
Pendapatan Korporat termasuk Basis of Assessment, Pematuhan Cukai (Tax Obligation),
Perkiraan Cukai (Tax Computation) dan Pemfailan Cukai (Tax Filing) selaras dengan Akta Cukai
Pendapatan, Penggal 35.
-TAMAT-
Disediakan oleh:
Bahagian Hasil
Kementerian Kewangan dan Ekonomi
Emel: revenue@mofe.gov.bn
Tarikh: 15 Rabiulawal 1446
19 September 2024
Rujukan: H/KORP/27

PRESS RELEASE
MINISTRY OF FINANCE AND ECONOMY
CORPORATE INCOME TAX SOCIALISATION SESSION
1. The Revenue Division, Ministry of Finance and Economy (MOFE) held a Socialisation Session on
Corporate Income Tax on Saturday, 14th September 2024 which took place at Bilik Serbaguna 2,
Level 3, Island Block Ministry of Finance and Economy.
2. The session hopes to spread awareness and ensure common understanding with regards to
Corporate Income Tax matters among taxpayers, and to help taxpayers to increase their level of
tax compliance.
3. The session was delivered by YM Nurul Fadilah binti Hj Osman, Finance Officer at the Revenue
Division, MOFE whereby she explained the overview of Corporate Income Tax including the Basis
of Assessment, Tax Obligation, Tax Computation and Tax Filing in accordance with the Income Tax
Act, Chapter 35.
-END-
Prepared by:
Revenue Division
Ministry of Finance and Economy
Email: revenue@mofe.gov.bn
Tarikh: 15 Rabiulawal 1446
19 September 2024
Rujukan: H/KORP/27
